name_en: Center for Middle East Strategic Studies (CMESS)
description: Tehran-based think tank with ties to the Iranian foreign-policy establishment. Institutional home of [Kayhan Barzegar](/people/kayhan-barzegar), who has served as director. CMESS produces analysis on regional geopolitics, Iran's nuclear program, and Persian Gulf security broadly aligned with regime foreign-policy perspectives.

sources.title: Center for Middle East Strategic Studies

editorial_notes: CMESS is regime-adjacent; its output generally reflects the interests of the Iranian foreign-policy establishment.
